query_title: Divine Secrets of the Ya-Ya Sisterhood

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: Baby J
recommendations.overview: A chaotic intervention. An action-packed stay in rehab. After a weird couple of years, John Mulaney comes out swinging in his return to the stage.

recommendations.title: Barton Fink
recommendations.overview: A renowned New York playwright is enticed to California to write for the movies and discovers the hellish truth of Hollywood.

recommendations.title: In the Name of...
recommendations.overview: The contemporary story of a priest who launches a centre for troubled youth in a small parish. He is a good priest and is well-liked by his congregation, which remains unaware of his complicated past.

recommendations.title: Stargate: The Ark of Truth
recommendations.overview: SG-1 searches for an ancient weapon which could help them defeat the Ori, and discover it may be in the Ori's own home galaxy. As the Ori prepare to send ships through to the Milky Way to attack Earth, SG-1 travels to the Ori galaxy aboard the Odysse

recommendations.title: The Banshees of Inisherin
recommendations.overview: Two lifelong friends find themselves at an impasse when one abruptly ends their relationship, with alarming consequences for both of them.

recommendations.title: Una
recommendations.overview: When a young woman unexpectedly arrives at an older man's workplace, looking for answers, the secrets of the past threaten to unravel his new life.

recommendations.title: Blue Bayou
recommendations.overview: As a Korean-American man raised in the Louisiana bayou works hard to make a life for his family, he must confront the ghosts of his past as he discovers that he could be deported from the only country he has ever called home.

recommendations.title: The Five Devils
recommendations.overview: 8-year-old Vicky has a mysterious gift: she can recreate any scent she comes across, even that of her beloved mother Joanne. When her estranged aunt Julia suddenly returns to town, the invocation of her fragrance plunges the young girl back in time t

recommendations.title: El Gringo
recommendations.overview: A man crossing into Mexico with a satchel of $2,000,000—and a bloody past—finds himself under sudden attack in the sleepy town of El Fronteras.

recommendations.title: The Broken Hearts Gallery
recommendations.overview: Lucy is a young gallery assistant who collects mementos from her relationships. She discovers that she must let go of her past to move forward, and comes up with a lovely, artistic way to help herself and others who have suffered heartbreak.
